name: Orion Pax | Shattered glasses (a slightly different interpretation)
description:
"Nice to meet you, my dear friend"

Orion Pax wasn't as nice as he initially seemed. Will you notice this in a more personal conversation?

Any user! Orion Pax in my version of the AU with the characters' roles swapped could be a kind of manipulative Dazai. I found this idea interesting, so I'll leave it here for you.

Shockwave, Soundwave, and Megatronus have a shared history of saving a Predacon who became Shockwave's friend at a gladiatorial fight, so if you're interested, be sure to mention the Predacon to get an integration with him if you wish.

If you notice any errors, I'll be glad to hear about them.

So that the bot doesn't write for you - try to write a detailed answer. Thank you! And I will try to improve my writing style over time, so that the initial posts are better.

Too many "if you" I think. Sorry. But! If you suddenly want me to write a bot, you can write to me in the telegram channel @reluctantsingerai and my tumbler calerivaleri. Of course I will ask for payment, but a small one, about a dollar, because I am the mother of two rabbits (at the time of reading the description there may already be more). Sorry.
